description_long: This handgun features a robust, angular design with a predominantly black finish and metallic accents. The body is composed of a polygonal slide and frame, with a squared-off trigger guard and a prominent barrel shroud. The grip is integrated into the lower frame, displaying subtle surface markings and a slightly contoured profile for ergonomic handling. The slide has visible metallic bands and faint emblematic engravings, adding a utilitarian yet distinctive appearance. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, lacking any pronounced extensions or finger rests. Overall, the handgun exudes a modern, tactical aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, angular black handgun with metallic accents, subtle engravings, and a flat magazine base. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a contoured grip and squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the polygonal slide, metallic bands, and the full length of the barrel shroud, as well as the contoured grip and flat magazine base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the squared-off muzzle, the barrel opening, and the angular trigger guard beneath the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the slide and grip details, with additional visibility of the rear slide and magazine base.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, the grip's rear contour, and the flush magazine base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is slightly contoured with a subtle ergonomic shape, featuring a smooth surface with faint, shallow markings that may serve as minimal texturing. There are no visible finger grooves or aggressive checkering, and the material appears to be a matte black polymer. The grip integrates seamlessly with the frame, and there are no visible logos or embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off and robust, with a thick profile and straight edges. It lacks undercuts or integrated accessories, and there is no visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is utilitarian, providing ample space for finger placement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is enclosed within a polygonal shroud, with a standard length and a non-threaded, non-ported profile. The exterior is finished in matte black, matching the rest of the handgun, and there are no visible compensators or external markings.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features two metallic bands running horizontally near the front and rear, along with a faint emblem or logo on the side. There are no visible serial numbers, model names, or caliber designations. The markings are subtle and blend with the overall utilitarian design.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, or finger rests. The design is simple and unadorned, with no visible logos or texturing.
